tasks.subject: Task 1: Add dependencies to xtask
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `toml` and `serde_json` workspace dependencies to the xtask crate.

**Files:**
- Modify: `crates/xtask/Cargo.toml`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `xtask` compiles with `toml` and `serde_json` dependencies
- [ ] `cargo xtask check-arch` still passes

**Verify:** `cargo build -p xtask` → exits 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/xtask/Cargo.toml"], "verifyCommand": "cargo build -p xtask", "acceptanceCriteria": ["xtask compiles with toml and serde_json", "check-arch still passes"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Implement sync-version with tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement the `sync-version` subcommand with `--check` flag and unit tests.

**Files:**
- Modify: `crates/xtask/src/main.rs`
- Modify: `crates/xtask/Cargo.toml` (add tempfile dev-dep)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `cargo xtask sync-version` reads workspace version and writes to both JSON files
- [ ] `cargo xtask sync-version --check` exits 0 when in sync, exits 1 when not
- [ ] Unit tests cover: version read, JSON update (top-level and nested), check mode pass/fail
- [ ] Existing `check-arch` command still works

**Verify:** `cargo test -p xtask` → all tests pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/xtask/src/main.rs", "crates/xtask/Cargo.toml"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p xtask", "acceptanceCriteria": ["sync-version writes version to both JSON files", "sync-version --check exits 1 on mismatch", "unit tests pass", "check-arch still works"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Add mise tasks
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `sync-version`, `bump`, and `sync-version-check` mise tasks. Update `check` to include version sync verification.

**Files:**
- Modify: `mise.toml`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `mise run sync-version` runs `cargo xtask sync-version`
- [ ] `mise run bump -- <version>` updates Cargo.toml and propagates
- [ ] `mise run check` includes version sync check

**Verify:** `mise run sync-version` → updates both JSON files; `mise run check` → passes

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mise.toml"], "verifyCommand": "mise run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["sync-version mise task works", "bump mise task works", "check includes version sync"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Add CI step
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `cargo xtask sync-version --check` to the CI workflow.

**Files:**
- Modify: `.github/workflows/ci.yml`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] CI runs version sync check after architecture check

**Verify:** CI YAML is syntactically valid

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/ci.yml"], "verifyCommand": "mise run compile", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CI includes version sync check step"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Initial sync
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Run `sync-version` to align all versions, then verify the full check suite passes.

**Files:**
- Modify: `plugin/tndm/.claude-plugin/plugin.json`
- Modify: `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Both JSON files contain the workspace version (`0.1.0`)
- [ ] `mise run check` passes

**Verify:** `mise run check` → exits 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["plugin/tndm/.claude-plugin/plugin.json", ".claude-plugin/marketplace.json"], "verifyCommand": "mise run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["both JSON files synced to 0.1.0", "full check suite passes"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```
